title: Harness design and implementation — full summary

origin.speaker: Mitchell Hashimoto
origin.thesis: AI coding harness is not new. Vibe-coders were already doing it; the name is new.

bitter_lesson.principle: As models get smarter, harnesses must get simpler

checkers.name: check_hexa_only
checkers.desc: no new .py/.sh under shared/ (exceptions: shared/scripts/, shared/bin/)

checkers.name: check_ai_native
checkers.desc: no prose .md in shared/rules/ or shared/config/

checkers.name: check_l0_lockdown
checkers.desc: require commit message marker when touching L0 paths

gc.trigger: manual first; weekly chain into growth-tick.hexa later (separate approval)

scans.name: scan_drift
scans.desc: extract shared/... paths from CLAUDE.md files, verify existence

scans.name: scan_violation
scans.desc: grep for R1 (.py/.sh under shared/) and R14 (non-CLAUDE .md in rules/)

logs.purpose: failures only — P1 map mistake record

nexus_alignment.resolution: only edit local .git/hooks/pre-commit + add new .hexa files
all logic in .hexa; shell only for git-hook bootstrap
all outputs are JSONL; only human-facing summaries are in CLAUDE.md and this summary.json
lint checks for L0 path modifications and requires commit-message marker

evolution_roadmap.desc: manual rule enforcement via pre-commit lint + manual gc
autofix.hexa reads mistakes.jsonl recurrent patterns, applies known fixes
gc integrated into growth-tick.hexa weekly (requires hooks-config.json approval)
before adding rules, review if existing rules are still needed; prefer deletion over addition

commits.msg: feat(harness): Hashimoto AI coding harness SSOT 신설
feat(harness): P2 lint.hexa + P3 gc.hexa 구현 (L1 골조)

next_actions_user_local.cmd: stage a shared/foo.py and attempt commit

known_limitations: verification blocked in this session: hexa binary SIGKILL'd inside Bash tool environment (not a code issue)
autofix loop (L2) not implemented — mistakes.jsonl must accumulate patterns first
gc --dead is expensive (O(n) grep per candidate); opt-in only, not in --scan default chain once productionized
